calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On April 24, 2003
Off Calendar Apr-25-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Plaintiff American Employers Group, Inc. present with counsel, Michael Perkins.
Plaintiff's witness, Chandra Singh sworn and examined.
The Court hears evidence in support of plaintiff's request for entry of judgment and grants judgment for declaratory relief. Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
